Consumer Advisories (855) 411-2372 Resources for Practitioners If you are a financial practitioner, educator or other professional who helps consumers plan and manage their money, these materials will help you strengthen your professional practice.
Printed publications are no longer available from the CFPB.
Please use our downloadable PDFs and our "print as handout" buttons to print your own copies.
Resources to share with the people you serve We have guides to help people understand and plan for big financial goals, answers to hundreds of financial questions, and more.

rules.text: Select the card features you want and see apples-to-apples comparisons from our data set of hundreds of cards—no registration required and no paid promotions.
